mapper.insert: INSERT INTO virtual_api_daily_stats (stat_date, total_count, success_count, fail_count, timeout_count, avg_duration_s, success_rate) SELECT #{statDate}, COUNT(*) AS total_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fail_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN error_code = 'TIMEOUT' OR error_message LIKE '%timeout%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS timeout_count, ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN status = 'completed' AND started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, completed_at) END ), 2) AS avg_duration_s, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS success_rate FROM ai_video_task WHERE create_time >= #{statDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{statDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_count = VALUES(total_count), success_count = VALUES(success_count), fail_count = VALUES(fail_count), timeout_count = VALUES(timeout_count), avg_duration_s = VALUES(avg_duration_s), success_rate = VALUES(success_rate), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS total_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS success_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fail_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN error_code = 'TIMEOUT' OR error_message LIKE '%timeout%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS timeout_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' AND started_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, completed_at) END), 2) AS avg_duration_s, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS success_rate FROM ai_video_task WHERE create_time >= #{statDate} AND create_time < DATE_ADD(#{statDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
